versions.version_description: I have the tabs for the intro.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
All strums should be played with palm muting, but it's not possible to have a strum which is
both accented and muted using the strumming pattern tool.

[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
Loving can hurt[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Loving can hurt sometimes[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
But it's the only thing that I know[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
When it gets hard[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
You know it can get hard sometimes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
It is the only thing that makes us feel alive[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
We keep this love in a photograph[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
We make these memories for ourselves[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Where our eyes are never closing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Our hearts were never broken[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
And times forever frozen still[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
So you can keep me inside the pocket of your[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Ripped jeans holding me closer till our[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Eyes meet, you won't ever be alone[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Wait for me to come home[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Loving can heal[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Loving can mend your soul[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
And it's the only thing that I know[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
I swear it will get easier[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]
remember that with every piece of ya[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
It is the only thing we take with us when we die[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
We keep this love in a photograph[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
We make these memories for ourselves[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Where our eyes are never closing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Our hearts were never broken[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And times forever frozen still[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
So you can keep me inside the pocket of your[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Ripped jeans holding me closer till our[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
Eyes meet, you won't ever be alone[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
And if you hurt me that's okay baby, only[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Words bleed inside these pages you just[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Hold me, and I won't ever let you go[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Wait for me to come home[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Wait for me to come home[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Wait for me to come home[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Wait for me to come home[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, you can fit, me inside the necklace you got when you were[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
16 next to your heartbeat where I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
Should be, keep it deep within your soul[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
And if you hurt me that's okay baby only[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Words bleed inside these pages you just[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Hold me and I won't ever let you go[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm away I will remember how you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Kissed me under the lamp post back on sixth street[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
Hearing you whisper through the phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] N.C.
Wait for me to come home[/tab]
